name: Airbnb Property Search Workflow
description: Search for properties in San Francisco on Airbnb with filters and extraction

browser_automation.description: Comprehensive Airbnb search workflow with date selection, guest configuration, filtering, and property details extraction

sequences.name: airbnb_property_search
sequences.description: Search for properties in San Francisco with specific dates and guest count

steps.name: Calculate dates using JavaScript
steps.script: (() => { const today = new Date(); const checkIn = new Date(today); checkIn.setDate(today.getDate() + 7); const checkOut = new Date(checkIn); checkOut.setDate(checkIn.getDate() + 3); window.__airbnb_dates = { checkIn: checkIn.toISOString().split('T')[0], checkOut: checkOut.toISOString().split('T')[0], checkInFormatted: checkIn.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'long', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' }), checkOutFormatted: checkOut.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'long', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' }) }; return window.__airbnb_dates; })()

steps.name: Select check-in date (7 days from now)
steps.script: (() => { const checkInDate = window.__airbnb_dates.checkIn; const dateElements = document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid*="calendar-day"]'); for (const el of dateElements) { if (el.getAttribute('data-testid').includes(checkInDate)) { el.click(); return true; } } return false; })()

steps.name: Wait for check-out date to be selectable
Select check-out date (3 days after check-in)
steps.script: (() => { const checkOutDate = window.__airbnb_dates.checkOut; const dateElements = document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid*="calendar-day"]'); for (const el of dateElements) { if (el.getAttribute('data-testid').includes(checkOutDate)) { el.click(); return true; } } return false; })()

steps.name: Add adults (click + button once to make it 2)
Scroll to price range in filter modal
Extract first 5 property listings
steps.script: (() => { const listings = []; const cards = document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid="card-container"]'); const maxListings = Math.min(5, cards.length); for (let i = 0; i < maxListings; i++) { const card = cards[i]; const titleEl = card.querySelector('[data-testid="listing-card-title"]'); const priceEl = card.querySelector('span._tyxjp1'); const ratingEl = card.querySelector('[aria-label*="rating"]'); const typeEl = card.querySelector('[data-testid="listing-card-subtitle"] > span:first-child'); const imageEl = card.querySelector('img[data-original-uri]'); listings.push({ position: i + 1, title: titleEl ? titleEl.textContent.trim() : 'N/A', price: priceEl ? priceEl.textContent.trim() : 'N/A', rating: ratingEl ? ratingEl.textContent.trim() : 'No rating', type: typeEl ? typeEl.textContent.trim() : 'N/A', image: imageEl ? imageEl.src : null }); } return { timestamp: new Date().toISOString(), checkIn: window.__airbnb_dates.checkInFormatted, checkOut: window.__airbnb_dates.checkOutFormatted, location: 'San Francisco', guests: { adults: 2, children: 1 }, filters: { type: 'Entire place', priceRange: '$100-$300' }, listings: listings }; })()

steps.name: Wait for property page to load
Extract property details
steps.script: (() => { const propertyName = document.querySelector('[data-section-id="TITLE_DEFAULT"] h1')?.textContent?.trim() || 'N/A'; const hostName = document.querySelector('[data-section-id="HOST_PROFILE_DEFAULT"] h2')?.textContent?.trim() || 'N/A'; const amenitiesSection = document.querySelector('[data-section-id="AMENITIES_DEFAULT"]'); const amenities = amenitiesSection ? Array.from(amenitiesSection.querySelectorAll('[id^="pdp_v3_"]')).map(el => el.textContent.trim()).filter(text => text && !text.includes('Show all')) : []; const descriptionEl = document.querySelector('[data-section-id="DESCRIPTION_DEFAULT"] span'); const description = descriptionEl ? descriptionEl.textContent.trim() : 'N/A'; const bedroomsEl = document.querySelector('[data-section-id="OVERVIEW_DEFAULT"] ol li:nth-child(2)'); const bedrooms = bedroomsEl ? bedroomsEl.textContent.trim() : 'N/A'; const reviewsEl = document.querySelector('[data-section-id="REVIEWS_DEFAULT"] h2'); const reviews = reviewsEl ? reviewsEl.textContent.trim() : 'No reviews'; return { propertyName: propertyName, host: hostName, bedrooms: bedrooms, amenities: amenities.slice(0, 10), description: description.substring(0, 500) + (description.length > 500 ? '...' : ''), reviews: reviews }; })()

steps.name: Check availability in calendar
steps.script: (() => { const calendarSection = document.querySelector('[data-section-id="AVAILABILITY_CALENDAR_INLINE"]'); if (!calendarSection) return { calendarFound: false }; const availableDates = Array.from(calendarSection.querySelectorAll('[data-is-day-blocked="false"]')).length; const blockedDates = Array.from(calendarSection.querySelectorAll('[data-is-day-blocked="true"]')).length; return { calendarFound: true, availableDates: availableDates, blockedDates: blockedDates, checkInDate: window.__airbnb_dates.checkInFormatted, checkOutDate: window.__airbnb_dates.checkOutFormatted }; })()
